task_description: Add a MarkdownOutline Tool Panel to the left sidebar that displays document headings when a Markdown file is open. Includes: heading data extraction from Buffer, panel UI with indentation and click-to-jump, full Tool Panel integration and registration, data flow from FileNotebookView to panel on file load/switch, and scroll-to-offset on heading click.

verification.summary: cargo check -p warp_editor passes. cargo check -p warp has zero error[E] from our changes (only pre-existing protoc issue in unrelated dependency). All 4 heading_outline tests pass.
